title: Dragon Boating
description: Get up and get in the water and have a go at this ancient and exciting Chinese team sport.

tips.title: You can also use a bell boat.
Learn about water safety with the RNLI.
tips.details: You could [book a free visit from the RNLI to learn about water safety](https://rnli.org/youth-education/educational-visits).

safetyAlert: Young people must check and comply with the activity rules in chapter nine of the Policy, Organisation and Rules and the Adventurous Activity Permit Scheme.
